Local delivery in London Ontario within a few hours

icp: Value-conscious Canadian women who wear and style protective hair (wigs, braids, weaves, crochet) and want name-brand looks fast, affordably, and with easy pay-later options.

personas.name: Budget Braid Boss
personas.description: Buys pre-stretched braiding hair and crochet in bulk and is moved by lowest pricing, color variety, and free shipping thresholds.

personas.name: Glueless Wig Switcher
personas.description: Wants quick, natural-looking lace front and glueless wigs and responds to 'melted/perfect hairline' realism plus fast local delivery.

personas.name: Pay-Later Protector
personas.description: Loves a full look but watches cash flow, so Buy Now Pay Later and the money-back guarantee close the sale.

banned.claim: Repairs or heals damaged hair and scalp
banned.why: Cosmetics cannot claim to repair or heal - that implies altering body structure/function (unapproved drug claim).

banned.claim: Batana oil regrows hair or reverses hair loss
banned.why: Structure/function claim - cosmetics may only address appearance, not regrow hair or treat loss.

banned.claim: Skin care treats acne, eczema, or rosacea
banned.why: Treating a skin condition is a drug claim and is banned for cosmetics.

banned.claim: Anti-aging that reverses aging or boosts collagen production
banned.why: Reversing aging or boosting collagen alters body function - banned; use 'looks firmer / appears brighter' instead.
'Clinically proven' requires a real supporting study, which is not present on the site.

banned.claim: Oils and conditioners strengthen or restore hair from within
banned.why: Implies structural change to the hair; keep to appearance language like 'looks shinier' or 'feels smoother'.
